sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4473" key="a)lloiwpo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλλοι-ωπός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n4473.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of different shapes</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">21</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
